DivergenceResult.description: Gate 4. Populated only when sufficient FC snapshots and flagged player data exist.
DivergenceResult.title: DivergenceResult

LeaguePulseCard.description: Model-native opportunity card. Rejects market evidence/score keys.
LeaguePulseCard.title: LeaguePulseCard

LeaguePulseMarketCard.description: Labeled market-overlay card (Q3=B). Admits market evidence/score keys.
LeaguePulseMarketCard.title: LeaguePulseMarketCard

ModelCardResponse.description:
Curated PUBLIC model-card contract — the 8 safety/identity fields only.

Provenance fields (model_version / model_artifact_hash / git_sha) live on the
audit-internal PublishedModelCardSource artifact and are deliberately NOT exposed
here, so the public surface never leaks the 9-section ModelCard internals.
ModelCardResponse.title: ModelCardResponse

ModelReliability.description: QB-only descriptive model-reliability stamp (measured uncertainty, no verdict).
ModelReliability.title: ModelReliability

QBContextCard.description: F2: explicitly typed; extra fields forbidden (no provenance/market backdoor).
QBContextCard.title: QBContextCard

RosterAuditSignalsView.description: F3: curated signals view; nested decision_supported can never leak true.
RosterAuditSignalsView.title: RosterAuditSignalsView

StatusExplanation.description:
Auditable record of why a model_status was assigned (Step 0.5 spec §6.5).

Records which folds failed each validity predicate and whether the cold-start
fold was excused, so the status is a documented decision rather than a vibe.
StatusExplanation.title: StatusExplanation

TradeAssetCatalogEntry.description: A single selectable asset, pre-shaped in both payload forms.
TradeAssetCatalogEntry.title: TradeAssetCatalogEntry

TradeAssetCatalogResponse.description: The catalog envelope for a single search query.
TradeAssetCatalogResponse.title: TradeAssetCatalogResponse

TrustSurfaceResponse.description:
Typed Trust Surface contract: the full BacktestResult plus the hoisted,
consumer-facing fields. Non-breaking superset of the prior dict response, so the
frontend Hey API codegen has a real OpenAPI schema (no untyped object).
TrustSurfaceResponse.title: TrustSurfaceResponse

WhatChangedModelComparisonWindow.description:
Allowlisted, shape-closed model window — no market key can hide on it.

Admits ONLY the three honest model window shapes:
1. ``{status: insufficient_history}`` — status alone.
2. ``{status: model_multi_vintage_ambiguous, from_date, to_date, ambiguous_dates}``.
3. ``{from_date, to_date, from_vintage, to_vintage}`` — clean two-date window, no status.

``extra="forbid"`` (via ``_Strict``) rejects unknown keys (incl. a nested
``market_overlay``); the ``Literal`` status rejects unknown states; and the
post-validator rejects mixed/partial combinations so the window is fully closed.
WhatChangedModelComparisonWindow.title: WhatChangedModelComparisonWindow

WhatChangedModelFeatureFreshness.description:
Descriptive engine_b feature-source freshness for the model section.

Discloses which feature CSV backed the model vintage (a published runtime vs the
committed seed) and its hashes/as-of label, so the daily digest can show that captured
vintages are genuinely moving. Carries NO market field and certifies no decision.
WhatChangedModelFeatureFreshness.title: WhatChangedModelFeatureFreshness

WhatChangedModelPvoSeedStaleness.description:
Descriptive seed-vs-runtime drift summary — the §3.6 manual-promotion tripwire.

Surfaced ONLY when ``promote_recommended`` is True (silent on quiet drift). The count
of model-supported players drifted >5% and the coverage-count change are the stable
triggers; ``mean_abs_value_delta`` / ``p95_abs_value_delta`` are DISCLOSURE-only (never
promotion triggers — market-noise-sensitive). Carries no market field; certifies no
decision.

count_model_supported_players_drifted_gt.title: Count Model Supported Players Drifted Gt 5Pct

WhatChangedModelPvoSeedStaleness.title: WhatChangedModelPvoSeedStaleness

WhatChangedModelPvoStaleness.description:
Descriptive PVO source provenance for the model section + passive seed-staleness.

Provenance (source kind / hashes / as-of / paths) is ALWAYS disclosed so the digest can
show which artifact backed the vintage. The ``seed_staleness`` block appears only on the
promotion tripwire. A present-but-unverified runtime surfaces as ``not_ready`` (kind None
+ ``aborted_reason``), never hidden. Closed vocabularies so the API cannot report a
phantom source kind/status. Carries NO market field and certifies no decision.
WhatChangedModelPvoStaleness.title: WhatChangedModelPvoStaleness

WhatChangedVintage.description:
A complete model vintage — both hashes required and non-blank.

A vintage is the identity of a model output; a partial/empty vintage is never an
honest shape, so both fields are required (not Optional) and rejected if blank.
WhatChangedVintage.title: WhatChangedVintage

get.description: Return Engine B predictions for the current (2024) inference cohort.

schema.title: Response Get Engine B Scores Api Engine B Scores Get

get.description: Read-only League Pulse over the Phase 17/18 artifacts (artifact-state).
Read-only serve of the latest pre-built What-Changed report (artifact-state).

schema.title: Response Score Single Api Rookies Score Post
Response Score Class Api Rookies Score Class Post
Response Analyze Api Trade Analyze Post

get.description:
Read-only catalog of tradeable assets (rostered players + future picks).

The frontend selects from these pre-shaped entries; it never invents
TradeAsset / MarketAssetRef payloads or pick keys. ``limit`` is clamped
inside ``build_asset_catalog`` (max 0..100); short queries return empty.

post.description: Evaluate a multi-asset trade using model-native xVAR parity.
Evaluate a trade with post-trade roster overflow penalty (Forced Cut Penalty).
Market-overlay reconciliation (FantasyCalc), parallel to the model lane.

get.description:
Read-only Trust Surface endpoint.

Returns the most recent BacktestResult artifact for the position as JSON.
overall_grade is hoisted to the top level for quick consumer access.
No recomputation — file read only.

Returns 404 if no artifact exists for the position.

Return the curated public ModelCardResponse for the position.

Reads the published, provenance-aligned PublishedModelCardSource
(``trust_surface/latest/model_card_source_{POS}.json``) and filters it to the 8
curated public fields — provenance fields stay audit-internal. Read-only; no card
generation or metric computation on demand.
